task_description: Implement unified contacts capability for Phase 42 FEAT-004: contact types, in-memory store, Capacitor bridge, CardDAV sync, and contact resolver with full test suite.

verification.summary: TypeScript typecheck passes with zero errors. All 108 vitest tests pass (21 new + 87 existing). Tests exercise real logic: CRUD ops, vCard parsing with real vCard strings, Levenshtein fuzzy matching, conflict resolution, bidirectional sync with mocked plugins. Source LOC: 453 (under 500 limit). Semantic review: APPROVED after 3 passes (11 issues fixed across v1 and v2).
